name: Chicken Breasts with Lemon and Pepper
recipeIngredient: 4 skinned and boned chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken breasts between 2 sheets of waxed paper and gently pound with a meat mallet until about 1/2 inch thick. Season with salt.
2. Heat butter in a large, heavy nonstick skillet over medium heat until bubbly and starting to brown. Add chicken and cook for 10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until almost opaque in the center and golden on both sides. Remove to serving plates.
3. Let the skillet cool briefly. Add lemon juice, and stir to loosen brown drippings in the bottom of the pan. Spoon over chicken, season well with pepper, then sprinkle with parsley.
